knowledge.html:
XV. ARTICLES (MAO TU)

1. Indefinite articles: a/an

An dung truoc 1 danh tu dem duoc so it bat dau bang 1 nguyen am (u, e, o, a, i).
A dung truoc danh tu dem duoc so it bat dau la 1 phu am.

*An: dung truoc nguyen am hoac "h" cam.

Ex: a doctor, a bag, an animal, an hour...

"a/an" duoc dung truoc:

  • Danh tu dem duoc, so it.
  • Trong cac cau truc: so + adj + a/an + noun; such + a/an + noun; as + adj + a/an + noun + as; How + adj + a/an + noun + verb!
  • Chi mot nguoi duoc de cap qua ten.
  • Truoc cac danh tu trong ngu dong vi.
  • Trong cac cum tu chi so luong: a pair, a couple, a lot of, a little, a few, a large/great number of...
Ex: She is so pretty a girl.
It's such a beautiful picture.
She is as pretty a girl as her sister.
How beautiful a girl you are!
A Mrs. Blue sent you this letter.
Nguyen Du, a great poet, wrote that novel.

"a/an" khong duoc dung:

  • ONE duoc su dung thay A/An de nhan manh.
  • Truoc danh tu khong dem duoc.
  • Truoc cac danh tu dem so nhieu.
Ex: There is a book on the table, but one is not enough.
Ex: Coffee is also a kind of drink.
Ex: Dogs are faithful animals.

2. Definite article: the

"the" duoc dung truoc:

  • Nhung vat duy nhat: the sun, the moon, the world.
  • Cac danh tu duoc xac dinh nhan boi cum tinh tu / menh de quan he.
  • Cac danh tu duoc xac dinh qua ngu canh hoac de cap truoc do.
  • Cac danh tu chi su giai tri: the theater, the concert, the church.
  • Cac song, bien, dai duong, day nui: the Mekong River, the East Sea, the Pacific Ocean, the Himalayas.
  • Mot nhom cac dao hoac quoc gia: the Philippines, the United States.
  • Tinh tu dung nhu danh tu tap hop: the Poor, the Rich.
  • Trong so sanh nhat: Nam is the cleverest in his class.
  • Ten nguoi o so nhieu (chi gia dinh): The Blacks, the Blues, the Nams.
  • Cac danh tu dai dien cho 1 loai: The cat is a lovely home pet.
  • Cac cau truc chi thoi gian, noi chon: in the morning, in the street, in the water...
  • So thu tu: the first, the second, the third...
  • Chuoi thoi gian hoac khong gian: the next, the following, the last...

"the" khong dung truoc:

  • Truoc cac danh tu so nhieu noi chung: They build houses near the hall.
  • Danh tu truu tuong, khong dem duoc: Independence is a happy thing.
  • Cac danh tu chi mau sac: Red and white make pink.
  • Cac mon hoc: Math is her worst subject.
  • Cac chat lieu, vat lieu, kim loai: Steel is made from iron.
  • Cac ten nuoc, chau luc, thanh pho: Ha Noi is the capital of Vietnam.
  • Cac chuc danh, ten nguoi: President Bill Clinton, Ba, Nga...
  • Cac bua an, mon an, thuoc an: We have rice and fish for dinner.
  • Ten cac tro choi, the thao: Football is a popular sport in Vietnam.

exercises.question: Don't drive into that street. It is _____ one-way street.
exercises.explanation: 'one-way' bat dau bang am /w/ (phu am) => dung 'a'.

exercises.question: Sir Humphrey has been _____ MP for five years.
exercises.explanation: 'MP' doc la /em pi:/, bat dau bang nguyen am /e/ => dung 'an'.

exercises.question: Did you read _____ book I lent you _____ last week?
exercises.explanation: 'the book' vi duoc xac dinh boi 'I lent you'. 'last week' khong can mao tu.

exercises.question: I went by _____ train to _____ West of England.
exercises.explanation: 'by train' (phuong tien) khong dung mao tu. 'the West of England' co 'the' vi chi vung cu the.

exercises.question: We visited _____ Canada and _____ United States.
exercises.explanation: 'Canada' khong dung mao tu (ten nuoc don). 'the United States' luon co 'the' (ten nuoc so nhieu).

exercises.question: Peru is _____ country in South America. _____ capital is Lima.
exercises.explanation: 'a country' (mot nuoc bat ky). 'The capital' duoc xac dinh (thu do cua Peru).

exercises.question: I fell in _____ love with him because of his kind nature.
exercises.explanation: 'fall in love' la thanh ngu co dinh, khong dung mao tu.

exercises.question: Do you know exactly _____ number of Siberian tigers in China?
exercises.explanation: 'the number of' = so luong cu the cua... (duoc xac dinh).

exercises.question: It is estimated that only 1,000 pandas remain in _____ wild.
exercises.explanation: 'in the wild' = trong tu nhien (cum co dinh).

exercises.question: _____ friend in need is _____ friend indeed.
exercises.explanation: Tuc ngu: 'A friend in need is a friend indeed.' Noi chung chung => dung 'a'.

exercises.question: It is estimated that about 640 women remain illiterate in _____ world.
exercises.explanation: 'the world' = the gioi (vat duy nhat).

exercises.question: It was a beautiful day. _____ sun shone brightly in _____ sky.
exercises.explanation: 'the sun' va 'the sky' la nhung vat duy nhat.

exercises.question: It is said that Robinhood robbed _____ rich and gave the money to _____ poor.
exercises.explanation: 'the rich' va 'the poor' = nguoi giau, nguoi ngheo (tinh tu dung nhu danh tu tap hop).

exercises.question: This morning I bought a newspaper and a magazine. _____ newspaper is in my bag but I don't know where _____ magazine is.
exercises.explanation: Da de cap o cau truoc ('a newspaper', 'a magazine') => lan thu 2 dung 'the'.

exercises.question: What is your _____ biggest dream in _____ life?
exercises.explanation: 'your biggest dream' da co tinh tu so huu 'your'. 'in life' noi chung khong can 'the'.

exercises.question: Did you have _____ good time at the party last night?
exercises.explanation: 'have a good time' = vui ve (thanh ngu dung 'a').

exercises.question: The local authorities are conducting _____ campaign to help _____ disabled.
exercises.explanation: 'a campaign' (mot chien dich). 'the disabled' = nguoi khuyet tat (tinh tu lam danh tu tap hop).

exercises.question: _____ most important thing when you take part in any examination is to be calm.
exercises.explanation: So sanh nhat: 'the most important thing'.

exercises.question: Every year, thousands of tourists visit _____ Nile River.
exercises.explanation: Ten song co 'the': 'the Nile River'.

exercises.question: My brother-in-law is _____ engineer in a car company.
exercises.explanation: 'engineer' bat dau bang nguyen am /e/ => dung 'an'.
